What We Do

Media built to sell properties faster

Every shoot is crafted for the way buyers actually browse listings today — cinematic, fast, mobile-first.

01

Property Walkthrough Videos

Guided cinematic tours that let buyers experience the flow of a home before they ever step inside.

02

Instagram Reels

Short, scroll-stopping reels edited for reach — built to get a listing in front of more serious buyers.

03

Drone Cinematography

Sweeping aerial footage that shows scale, surroundings, and the address that words can't capture.

04

Luxury Photography

High-end stills with intentional light and composition for listings, brochures and print collateral.

05

Social Media Content

A content rhythm built for Instagram and beyond, so your listings stay visible week after week.

06

Property Marketing Content

End-to-end campaign assets — from listing pages to WhatsApp brochures — built to convert interest into inquiries.

Why OWLX MEDIA

Built for property owners who refuse average

Premium Quality

Every frame is shot and edited to a luxury standard, not a generic listing standard.

Chennai Focused

We know the city's neighborhoods, light, and what makes a Chennai property stand out.

Affordable Pricing

One transparent package at ₹3,500 — no surprise add-ons, no negotiation games.

Fast Delivery

Edited content delivered in 2–5 days, so your listing stays current and competitive.

Cinematic Storytelling

We frame every property as a story buyers want to walk into, not just a checklist of rooms.

Refund Guarantee

If the final video doesn't meet your expectations, you get a full refund. No questions asked.

How It Works

From inquiry to delivery

1

Contact Us

Message us on WhatsApp with your property details.

2

Schedule Shoot

We confirm a convenient date and time for your property.

3

We Film Property

Our team arrives with professional gear to capture every angle.

4

Professional Editing

Cinematic edit, color grade, and social-ready formatting.

5

Delivery

Final content delivered straight to you, ready to publish.

FAQ

Common questions

Currently we serve Chennai only.

Usually within 2–5 days.

We offer a 100% refund guarantee.
